display.purpose: Rare page-level titles and auth screens.

headline.purpose: Dialog titles and major section headings.

title.purpose: Admin card titles and dense panel headers.

body.purpose: Default product copy, table cells, task metadata, and panel content.

label.purpose: Section titles, table headers, metadata labels, and compact badge labels.

shadows.name: soft-panel
shadows.purpose: Light-theme panel lift for app shell containers.

shadows.name: preview
shadows.purpose: Task previews, settings dropdowns, and active hover surfaces.

shadows.name: mobile-sheet
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets and mobile working panels.

motion.name: fast
motion.purpose: Micro feedback and quick state changes.

motion.name: normal
motion.purpose: Default hover, focus, and reveal transitions.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Collapse animation and transition duration to near-instant.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Decisive action button for create, save, claim, and complete flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; min-height: 36px; border: 1px solid var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); color: var(--sb-inverse, #ffffff); font: 500 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--sb-primary-hover, #115e59); border-color: var(--sb-primary-hover, #115e59); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--sb-focus-ring, rgba(56,189,248,0.55)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral action button for secondary commands and compact toolbars.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; min-height: 34px; border: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--sb-surface-3, #eef3fa); color: var(--sb-text, #0f172a); font: 400 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--sb-focus-ring, rgba(56,189,248,0.55)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Compact field style for filters, forms, and search controls.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; color: var(--sb-muted, #475569); font: 600 12px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-input { min-height: 36px; padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--sb-elevated, #f1f5f9); color: var(--sb-text, #0f172a); font: 400 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--sb-primary, #0f766e) 15%, transparent); }

components.name: State Badge
components.description: Semantic pill for availability, claimed, ongoing, completed, warning, and metadata states.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); font: 600 12px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: currentColor; } .ds-badge-primary { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--sb-primary, #0f766e) 15%, var(--sb-elevated, #f1f5f9)); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--sb-primary, #0f766e) 40%, var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0)); color: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); }

components.name: Task Card
components.description: Signature pool object with compact title, visible action affordances, and hover preview behavior.
components.html: Prepare release checklistHigh priority · 3d old
components.css: .ds-task-card { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; width: 180px; min-height: 120px; padding: 40px 10px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--sb-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--sb-text, #0f172a); text-align: center; font: 400 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-task-card:hover { border-color: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); } .ds-task-card strong { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.15; } .ds-task-meta { color: var(--sb-muted, #475569); font-size: 12px; } .ds-task-actions { position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 8px; right: 8px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 28px; min-height: 28px; padding: 0; border: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--sb-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--sb-muted, #475569); cursor: pointer; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { border-color: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); color: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); }

components.name: Navigation Row
components.description: Compact left-panel navigation item with explicit active state.
components.css: .ds-nav-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--sb-text, #0f172a); font: 400 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-row:hover { background: var(--sb-elevated, #f1f5f9); } .ds-nav-row-active { background: var(--sb-primary-subtle-bg, #e6f6f3); border-color: var(--sb-primary-subtle-border, #8ad3ca); color: var(--sb-text-strong, #020617); font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); }

components.name: Dialog Shell
components.description: Structured modal shell for CRUD and confirmation workflows.
components.html:
Create task
Keep the form focused and compact.
components.css: .ds-dialog { display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: min(520px, 100%); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); border-radius: 18px; background: var(--sb-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--sb-text, #0f172a); box-shadow: var(--sb-shadow-modal, 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.24)); font: 400 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-dialog header { padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); background: var(--sb-surface-2, #f8fbff); font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; } .ds-dialog-body { padding: 20px; } .ds-dialog footer { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); background: var(--sb-surface-2, #f8fbff); } .ds-dialog button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 8px 12px; min-height: 34px; border-radius: 10px; font: 500 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-dialog .ds-btn-secondary { border: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); background: var(--sb-surface-3, #eef3fa); color: var(--sb-text, #0f172a); } .ds-dialog .ds-btn-primary { border: 1px solid var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); background: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); color: var(--sb-inverse, #ffffff); } .ds-dialog .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--sb-primary-hover, #115e59); border-color: var(--sb-primary-hover, #115e59); } .ds-dialog button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--sb-focus-ring, rgba(56,189,248,0.55)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Admin and metrics table vocabulary for dense operational data.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: var(--sb-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--sb-text, #0f172a); font: 400 13px system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-table th { padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); color: var(--sb-muted, #475569); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-align: left; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-table td { padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sb-border, #e2e8f0); vertical-align: middle; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: var(--sb-elevated, #f1f5f9); } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--sb-primary-subtle-border, #8ad3ca); background: var(--sb-primary-subtle-bg, #e6f6f3); color: var(--sb-primary, #0f766e); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
ScrumBringer's visual system is a compact operating cockpit for teams that trust people to pull work. It should feel autonomous, clear, and operational: the UI stays quiet until state changes, then uses direct color, shape, and motion to reveal what is available, claimed, active, blocked, stale, or complete.

The existing system is a restrained product UI: system sans typography, cool slate neutrals, teal primary actions, tight spacing, 8-12px component corners, and strong semantic state colors. It should preserve density and scan speed rather than chasing brand spectacle. The product rejects push-assignment habits, static backlog sprawl, and decorative dashboards that hide the next action.
keyCharacteristics: Teal is the action and selection color, not decoration.
State is communicated through labels, chips, borders, icons, and copy, not color alone.
Cards and rows are compact, bordered surfaces with modest tonal layering.
Motion exists for feedback, reveal, loading, stale-task decay, and mobile panel movement only.

rules.name: The Teal Is Action Rule
rules.body: Pool Teal is reserved for things the user can act on or states that prove ownership. Do not use it as decorative chrome.

rules.name: The State Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: Success, warning, danger, and info are semantic. Never use them because a screen "needs more color."

rules.name: The No New Side-Stripe Rule
rules.body: Do not add new colored border-left or border-right stripe patterns. Existing legacy status edges should be contained and replaced by chips, dots, or full state treatments when a surface is redesigned.

rules.name: The One Sans Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce display fonts or decorative type into product UI. This interface earns confidence through consistency.

rules.name: The Data First Rule
rules.body: Timers, API secrets, counts, progress values, and variable hints use monospace or tabular numerals when alignment improves comprehension.

rules.name: The Border First Rule
rules.body: Resting product surfaces use a 1px Line Slate border before they use shadow.

rules.name: The Shadow Means Overlay Rule
rules.body: If an element casts a strong shadow, it should be a dialog, dropdown, preview, toast, drawer, or actively hovered surface.

dos: Do make pull behavior obvious: available, claimed, now working, released, and completed must remain visually distinct.
Do use Pool Teal for primary actions, current selection, ownership, and progress.
Do preserve compact panel density with 8-12px spacing, 8-12px radii, and clear scan paths.
Do communicate state with words, icons, chips, and shape as well as color.
Do keep task actions visible and reachable even when the card is small.
Do use skeletons, inline hints, and empty states that teach the next action.
Do keep motion short: 120-300ms for feedback and reveal, with reduced-motion behavior preserved.
donts: Don't create push-assignment patterns that imply someone else owns deciding who does the work.
Don't make the product feel like Jira, Asana, or Trello when those tools reinforce direct assignment, backlog sprawl, and manager-driven routing.
Don't build static backlog views where old and urgent work look the same.
Don't add decorative dashboards that hide the next action.
Don't make workflows, rules, cards, or process surfaces feel like paperwork.
Don't blur "assigned", "claimed", and "now working" into one ambiguous ownership state.
Don't add visual noise that makes the shared pool harder to scan.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative stripes, or large soft shadow plus 1px border as a default card style.
Don't add new colored side-stripe border patterns. Use chips, dots, full borders, or semantic badges instead.
